relations.target: create new serial numbers by operations type
relations.evidence: Before assigning serial numbers on receipts or delivery orders, be sure that the ability to create new serial numbers by operations type is enabled.
Serial numbers can be entered directly into the Serial Numbers field on a receipt
Serial numbers can be entered directly into the Serial Numbers field on a delivery order
To make the Serial Numbers field visible... tick the Serial Numbers checkbox
click the oi-settings-adjust icon, and in the drop-down menu, tick the Serial Numbers checkbox
In the Detailed Operations pop-up window, manually enter serial numbers...
Assign multiple serial numbers at once by clicking the Generate Serials/Lots button in the Detailed Operations pop-up window.
Doing so opens a new popup, Generate Serial numbers...
Doing so opens a new popup, Generate Serial numbers, which contains a few fields: - First Serial Number...
Doing so opens a new popup, Generate Serial numbers, which contains a few fields: - First Serial Number... - Number of SN...
Doing so opens a new popup, Generate Serial numbers, which contains a few fields: - First Serial Number... - Number of SN... - Keep current lines checkbox...
Another option for assigning multiple serial numbers at once is to click the Import Serials/Lots button in the Detailed Operations pop-up window.
Doing so opens the Import Serials pop-up window.
Enter each serial number on a separate line in the Lots/Serial numbers text field.
The newly generated serials now appear in the Detailed Operations window.
...assigning multiple serial numbers...
If the import button is not visible, ensure the Create New box is checked...
As when generating serials... check the Keep current lines box...
